caption: A man with a beard, wearing a white baseball cap, a gold chain, and a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" printed in large gold letters, sits at a dark table. He is positioned in front of a white wall featuring a recurring logo that reads "UNICA HUSTLE" next to gold stars. Above him, a blue banner reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". A professional microphone on a black boom arm is positioned in front of him, and a black mug with the text "BOSS TALK 101" sits on the table to his right. In the lower-left corner, a small logo says "BOSS TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man maintains a similar posture, holding papers in his hands while looking slightly to his left and speaking. His facial expressions shift slightly as he talks, moving from a more open mouth to a closed-mouth expression.
